title: To Be Or Not To Be

testcases.input: func = () => expect(5).toBe(5) Output: {"value": true} Explanation: 5 === 5 so this expression returns true.
testcases.expectedOutput: {"value": true} Explanation: 5 === 5 so this expression returns true.

testcases.input: func = () => expect(5).toBe(null) Output: {"error": "Not Equal"} Explanation: 5 !== null so this expression throw the error "Not Equal".
testcases.expectedOutput: {"error": "Not Equal"} Explanation: 5 !== null so this expression throw the error "Not Equal".

testcases.input: func = () => expect(5).notToBe(null) Output: {"value": true} Explanation: 5 !== null so this expression returns true.
testcases.expectedOutput: {"value": true} Explanation: 5 !== null so this expression returns true.
